---
title: "STROBE checklist"
---

Observational-study reporting checklist (STROBE statement v4, 2007).
Each item links to the manuscript paragraph that addresses it.

| Item | Topic | Address |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Title and abstract | Manuscript Title + Abstract |
| 2 | Background | Intro P1–P3 |
| 3 | Objectives | Intro P4 |
| 4 | Study design | Methods §1, §2 |
| 5 | Setting | Methods §1 |
| 6 | Participants | Methods §1, Results §1 |
| 7 | Variables | Methods §3 |
| 8 | Data sources / measurement | Methods §1, §3 |
| 9 | Bias | Methods §7, §8 (DAG) |
| 10 | Study size | Results §1 |
| 11 | Quantitative variables | Methods §3, §4 |
| 12 | Statistical methods | Methods §4–§7 |
| 13 | Participants flow | Figure 2 (STROBE) |
| 14 | Descriptive data | Results §1 |
| 15 | Outcome data | Results §2–§5 |
| 16 | Main results | Results §2–§5 |
| 17 | Other analyses | Results §6 |
| 18 | Key results | Discussion P1 |
| 19 | Limitations | Discussion P5 |
| 20 | Interpretation | Discussion P1–P4 |
| 21 | Generalisability | Discussion P5 |
| 22 | Funding | Acknowledgements |
